name: sidekiq
explanation: Sidekiq is not an Agent metric check at all. The integration is wired through DogStatsD: the application emits StatsD metrics via the dogstatsd-ruby client and the Agent ingests them through its DogStatsD listener. The only Agent-side configuration in the spec is a logs file path (`/var/log/sidekiq.log`). There is no host/port/endpoint to discover and no check.py; auto-config in the network-probe sense does not apply. Real setup requires user code changes (gem install, initializer, dogstatsd_mapper_profiles in datadog.yaml), which can't be inferred from the wire.
notes: Logs-only / DogStatsD-driven integration. Pattern: application-emitted StatsD with required dogstatsd_mapper_profiles is structurally not autodiscoverable.
